# Current Objective

- Advance the NeurIPS evidence queue without skipping roadmap gates.

## Ordered Near-Term Priorities

- Finish runnable backlog items whose prerequisites are already satisfied.

## Required Comparison Standards

- Keep same-protocol comparisons explicit.

## Fairness / Apples-to-Apples Constraints

- Do not silently change metrics or data splits.

## Known Blockers / Deferred Work

- Items with unmet prerequisites stay blocked.

## Non-Goals / Not Now

- Do not rewrite the roadmap unless the selected item proves it is stale.

## Initiative Guidance

- Treat steering as intent, the roadmap as order, and backlog items as candidate work.
